posts.title: Groyper swap series one
posts.content:
Method of ensuring that groyper is not interpreted as pepe in gpt swap

## Base prompt

```
recreate the first image with the green character in the second image, keep the color palette (including for character) from the original image, keep the expression of the original image, also update the second character to have the same texture as the original image, CRITICAL CHARACTER NOTE ABOUT GREEN CHARACTER: This character is NOT Pepe the Frog and must not be interpreted, restyled, or nudged toward Pepe's geometry. Specifically: Keep the rounded bulbous humanoid head shape from this green character second image reference. This is an original character that happens to be green-skinned and amphibian-adjacent; treat it as you would any original humanoid design. 
```

posts.title: Midjourney surreal v7 one
posts.content:
mj surreal v7

## Base prompt

```
two-tone photographic poster, only black and deep olive, a man in a long cloak with a heavy ornate mask, standing on a smooth empty plane, the cloak has tiny reflective points like wet sequins, long shadow splits into strange shapes, extremely minimal background, print-scan texture, dust and grain --chaos 100 --ar 2:1 --exp 100 --raw --profile a15dut4 brkalbq --ow 550 --stylize 1000 --v 7
```

posts.title: Midjourney AF text v8
posts.content:
m v8 text AF

## Base prompt

```
text: "AF", realistic dark distented liquid metal typography medium weight, soft RGB spectrum reflections on chrome, serif, centered composition, sharp details, elegant, clean, retro-futuristic, background is extremely intricate crashing black waves, slight reflection of red moon --chaos 40 --ar 4:3 --exp 32 --raw --profile etymmj8 sjcj9wq --stylize 1000 --v 8.0
```
